variants.title: Fleetguard LF3387 Lube Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Donaldson P550070
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard LF3387 Lube Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Donaldson P550070
variants.description: Fleetguard® LF3387 cartridge oil filter is enviromentally friendly and features technology advances to achieve the high flow rates required by today’s modern engine designs.
specifications: Style: Lube Cartridge, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 101.1 mm, Inner Diameter: 16.5 mm, Length: 195.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose

variants.title: Donaldson P550070 Lube Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550070 Lube Cartridge is designed to provide reliable performance in lube cartridge applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Lube Cartridge, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 101.1 mm, Inner Diameter: 16.5 mm, Length: 195.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose
